notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jeremiah Jackson out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.
